Container.Name: esb-energy
Container.Overview: Self-hosted smart meter data tracker for ESB Networks (Ireland) customers. Downloads your 30-minute interval data nightly, calculates accurate costs using your day/night tariff rates, and integrates with Home Assistant. Requires an ESB Networks account and a 2captcha API key.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the web dashboard and API

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the SQLite database, cookies and downloaded CSVs

Config.Name: MPRN
Config.Description: Your Meter Point Reference Number (shown on your electricity bill)

Config.Name: 2captcha API Key
Config.Description: API key from 2captcha.com — needed for automated login. ~€2-3/month.

Config.Name: Scraper Time
Config.Description: Time to run the nightly download in 24h format (container local time)

Config.Name: Run On Start
Config.Description: Set to true to download data immediately when the container starts

Config.Name: Night Rate Start
Config.Description: Start of night rate window (Irish clock time)

Config.Name: Night Rate End
Config.Description: End of night rate window (Irish clock time)

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone — must match your location for correct DST handling
